title: bidens ternata var. ternata
intro: Bidens ternata var. ternata, also known as three-lobed beggarticks, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to tropical Africa and is widely distributed in the Old World tropics. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens ternata var. ternata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various conditions such as arthritis and wounds. Bidens ternata var. ternata can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
